title: Bridges Burned
content: You turn your back on him. 'I'm a detective, not your lookout. Find someone else to play your games.'||The dealer's face hardens. 'Big mistake, hero. Vane thought he was too good for this world too, and look what happened to him.'||'Keep digging if you want, but remember this: the people Vane was looking for don't wait for you to find them. They'll find you first. Stay out of the shadows, Detective. They're already filled.'
